query:
SELECT v.id, v.variantCode, v.variantName, v.productId, 
       GROUP_CONCAT(vcl.customerId) as customerIds
FROM product_variants v
LEFT JOIN variant_customer_links vcl ON v.id = vcl.variantId
WHERE v.productId = 60016
GROUP BY v.id
LIMIT 10;
